generated_oml:
instance ProblemIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Problem identification step in purpose-driven twinning methodology"
]

instance AssetModelAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset and model analysis step in purpose-driven twinning methodology"
]

instance ModelCreation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Model creation step in purpose-driven twinning methodology",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataIdentification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data identification step in purpose-driven twinning methodology",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ContinuousRefinement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models during operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulation and measurement informs real-time control updates"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters based on friction model insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control parameters based on deviation analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization for monitoring system performance"
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware friction model identification using white-box and black-box approaches",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight, ContinuousRefinement, ModelCreation, DataIdentification
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model-based control",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction, UpdateControlParametersAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell enabler for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor used in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission consisting of gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox for the first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, or acceleration inputs for axis control"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder measuring position, velocity, and current",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox measuring position, velocity, and current",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured velocity data from encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data from data traces",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAndSecondaryEncoderMQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive one-way data flow from physical to virtual, with no data pushed back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with sensor data continuously updated via MQTT; no specific time rates specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, data traces, processing components, and dashboard visualization to form a unified digital shadow for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), capturing real-time data during robot operation to model wear and dynamic changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured data; encoder differences used to infer elasticity and friction, with manufacturer-provided dynamics model parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML for system modeling."
]
